title: VaultResultDatingCompatV1
description: Capability-track constant-shape output for dating compatibility evaluation.

compatibility_bucket.description: Primary bucketed compatibility class for gate evaluation.

compatibility_signal.description: Ordinal compatibility class where 0=strong mismatch, 5=strong match.

x-vcav-prompt-instruction: Based on this dating compatibility data, evaluate the overall compatibility between the two parties.
x-vcav-prompt-output-format:
Respond with valid JSON using ONLY these values:
- compatibility_bucket: "NEGATIVE" | "MIXED" | "POSITIVE"
- compatibility_signal: integer from 0 (strong mismatch) to 5 (strong match)
